title: Double-gate omits silent-pass note
description: testnet_shielded_payment_end_to_end doc explains why both gates are needed but does not say what happens when only --include-ignored is passed without TESTNET_ENABLED=1: the test returns early and the harness counts it as PASSED. A CI system running --include-ignored without the env var sees green and incorrectly concludes the payment path was validated. The doc should state that the missing env var causes an early return reported as a pass not a skip.
